name: Volue ASA
summary: Volue AS provides software and technology solutions for the energy, power grid, and infrastructure markets worldwide. It operates in three segments: Energy, Power Grid, and Infrastructure. The Energy segment enables end-to-end optimization of the green energy value-chain by offering software solutions and consulting services related to forecasting and optimization of the different energy markets. The Power Grid segment enables power distributors to support electrification of society by unlocking flexibility and digital management of the power grid. This segment also offers software solutions and consulting services. The Infrastructure segment delivers flexible solutions for digital water management consisting of software solutions and consulting services. This segment also automates processes and machines for the construction industry. It also provides solutions for the water supply, transport, offshore, maritime, and defense industries. The company was founded in 2019 and is headquartered in Oslo, Norway. Volue AS is a subsidiary of Arendals Fossekompani ASA.
